_comment_semanticRetrieval: Enabled by default. Amelia uses its built-in local hash embedder for lightweight semantic boosting and incremental cache refresh.
_comment_assistantHistory: Enabled so the model can see what it already said and avoid contradictions across turns.
_comment_historyTurns: 8 turns gives the model meaningful multi-turn continuity.
_comment_localHits: 8 hits fills the local budget and reduces the chance the model falls back to training priors.
_comment_ragThreshold: Raise if the model still hallucinates from weak hits. Lower if too many valid prompts are refused.
_comment_temperature: 0.05 is deliberately low for factual/grounded answers. Raise toward 0.3 only for creative/brainstorming tasks.
_comment_stopSequences: <|im_end|> and <|endoftext|> are native Qwen3 end-of-turn tokens. They prevent the model from generating garbage after finishing its answer.
